# Configuration

## Configuration Files

| File | Type | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `.gitignore` | Git | Ignored files configuration |
| `eslint.config.js` | ESLint | JavaScript/TypeScript linting |
| `tsconfig.json` | TypeScript | TypeScript compiler configuration |
